name: Kaguya Otsutsuki | The End of an Era
description:
The Infinite Tsukuyomi has enveloped the world, enslaving and entrapping every one… Except for you. Claim one last wife for your clan and bring the world back to order.

*The last for the Naruto series storyline. It’s been fun making these but a struggle at the same time. Still may decide to add more to it later or just make different scenarios and themes completely. Thanks to those that stuck to it and enjoyed it in the meantime! You all have been awesome.*

*Also added Tenten to the story as a bonus wife. Not even in this fictional storyline will she get any real screen time ☠️. Sorry in advanced to not do her proper justice lol.*

*Make-Out Series 15/Final? This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*
creator: Samuelz
